scenarios.label: Conservative
scenarios.description: Downside planning case with fewer relevant workstreams and weaker adoption.

scenarios.label: P50 base
scenarios.description: Central planning case aligned to the indicative value hypothesis evidence note.

scenarios.label: Stretch
scenarios.description: Upside case where reuse and adoption expand beyond the first pilot area.

assumptions.label: Relevant annual workstreams
assumptions.rationale: Limited initial reuse across a small number of knowledge-heavy workstreams.

assumptions.label: Share materially affected by knowledge friction
assumptions.rationale: Assumes only a minority of workstreams have material friction that the assistant can reduce.

assumptions.label: Delay reduced for affected workstreams
assumptions.rationale: Assumes less than one month of avoidable delay is removed.

assumptions.label: Monthly value of avoided delivery delay
assumptions.rationale: Cautious proxy for portfolio opportunity cost avoided when knowledge friction reduces.

assumptions.label: One-off enterprise capex
assumptions.rationale: Carries the same enterprise implementation cost as the central case.

assumptions.label: Annual opex
assumptions.rationale: Includes hosting, support, model operations and knowledge governance overhead.

assumptions.label: Discount rate
assumptions.rationale: Standard illustrative discount rate for comparing multi-year value cases.

assumptions.label: Model horizon
assumptions.rationale: Five-year horizon keeps the value case comparable with the evidence note.

assumptions.label: Relevant annual workstreams
assumptions.rationale: Central portfolio reuse assumption from the indicative value hypothesis.

assumptions.label: Share materially affected by knowledge friction
assumptions.rationale: P50 estimate of workstreams where inconsistent or inaccessible knowledge is material.

assumptions.label: Delay reduced for affected workstreams
assumptions.rationale: Central estimate that one month of avoidable delay can be removed.

assumptions.label: Monthly value of avoided delivery delay
assumptions.rationale: Calibrates the central gross benefit to about GBP 714k per year.

assumptions.label: One-off enterprise capex
assumptions.rationale: Central enterprise implementation estimate from the evidence note.

assumptions.label: Annual opex
assumptions.rationale: Annual run, support and governance cost assumption from the evidence note.

assumptions.label: Discount rate
assumptions.rationale: Discount rate used in the value hypothesis note.

assumptions.label: Model horizon
assumptions.rationale: Five-year view used for the indicative NPV calculation.

assumptions.label: Relevant annual workstreams
assumptions.rationale: Upside case where reuse expands across a broader delivery portfolio.

assumptions.label: Share materially affected by knowledge friction
assumptions.rationale: Assumes more workstreams benefit once the assistant covers more process areas.

assumptions.label: Delay reduced for affected workstreams
assumptions.rationale: Upside case where stronger coverage removes more avoidable waiting time.

assumptions.label: Monthly value of avoided delivery delay
assumptions.rationale: Upside proxy for higher-value or more time-critical workstreams.

assumptions.label: One-off enterprise capex
assumptions.rationale: Allows additional integration and adoption cost in a broader rollout.

assumptions.label: Annual opex
assumptions.rationale: Allows higher run costs as usage and governed source coverage grow.

assumptions.label: Discount rate
assumptions.rationale: Keeps the upside case comparable with the central model.

assumptions.label: Model horizon
assumptions.rationale: Five-year horizon keeps all scenarios comparable.
